exampleSentencesTranslated: She always keeps an appearance of confidence when talking to everyone.
He likes the peaceful appearance of the countryside village in the morning.
This painting has a very special appearance and attracts attention.

example.vi: Cô ấy có vẻ đẹp tự nhiên.

definitions.vi: Vẻ bề ngoài hoặc diện mạo.

notes_md:
**vẻ** = appearance, look, the outward “air” someone or something gives off. It’s about what can be seen or felt on the outside.

It’s a noun, usually abstract and uncountable. Very often used in fixed pairs like **vẻ đẹp** (beauty), **vẻ ngoài** (outward appearance), **vẻ mặt** (facial expression), or **vẻ + adjective** to show a visible quality.


There’s also the super common phrase **vẻ như + clause**, meaning “seems like” or “appears that.”  

Close memory links: **bề ngoài** (outer side, more physical), **diện mạo** (more formal, “appearance”). Opposite idea: **nội tâm** (inner self).

exampleSentences: Cô ấy luôn giữ vẻ tự tin khi nói chuyện với mọi người.
Anh thích vẻ yên bình của ngôi làng quê vào buổi sáng.
Bức tranh này có vẻ rất đặc biệt và thu hút ánh nhìn.
